summary.zh: 杰克·布拉汉姆驾驶库珀 T53 卫冕成功，中置引擎布局到这一年已彻底取代了传统前置引擎方案；这也是印第安纳波利斯 500 最后一次计入 F1 世界冠军积分。
summary.en: Jack Brabham defended his title in the Cooper T53, by which point the mid-engine layout had entirely displaced the traditional front-engined car; this was also the last year the Indianapolis 500 counted toward the F1 World Championship.

content.zh: 杰克·布拉汉姆驾驶库珀 T53 卫冕成功，中置引擎布局到这一年已彻底取代了传统前置引擎方案；这也是印第安纳波利斯 500 最后一次计入 F1 世界冠军积分。
content.en: Jack Brabham defended his title in the Cooper T53, by which point the mid-engine layout had entirely displaced the traditional front-engined car; this was also the last year the Indianapolis 500 counted toward the F1 World Championship.
